name: clipboard
description: Read or write the macOS system clipboard. Mode 'read' returns the current clipboard text; mode 'write' replaces it with the supplied text.
when_to_use: User asks you to copy something to their clipboard, paste from clipboard, or work with what's on their clipboard right now.
when_not_to_use: User just wants you to remember a value within the conversation. Use the conversation, not the clipboard.

mode.description: 'read' returns the current text; 'write' replaces it.

text.description: Required for mode='write'. Ignored for mode='read'.
Read mode: clipboard contents. Write mode: what was written.
